content_of_post_to_comment: I have no idea whats going on and it could be a mental illness?? im on and off so many different meds so its like so hard to even know what is a chemical reaction and whats something internal i need to fix. please someone whos gone through so many different medications, therapy, etc etc etc tell me how to stop being so confused or even just how to not worry about anything in general. I love myself and my appearance and my body and my personality but i hate everyone else, but at the same time i feel sad when im alone??? WTF IS GOING ONN???? also please reddit dont take this down for some bs reason like "you didnt capitalize ____" in your post because ill literally start crying and screaming, THIS IS WHAT IM TALKING ABOUT RIGHT HERE I JUST DID IT like why am i so angry, i feel a lump in my throat right now like i want to cry just even thinking about this not going through omg
